business_description.nature_of_business: Boutique hotel ownership and management with integrated restaurant and event operations across Central and South Texas

coverages_discussed.notes: Policy Number WC-HCHP-2025-3350; Effective Date 05/01/2025; 11 claims in 2024; no cancellations

positives: Written contracts with indemnification required from all contractors
90% occupancy rate (units regularly occupied vs. vacant)
All hotel and restaurant locations fully sprinklered
Buildings fully sprinklered per NFPA 13 or 13R
Fire alarms hard-wired with central station monitoring
No OSHA citations in the past 3 years
16 years in business with same management team
Quality control/quality assurance program in place
concerns: Plumbing and electrical systems original from 2005 — not updated
No EV charging stations installed on premises
No quality control/quality assurance program (question 11 answered No)
Policy cancellation by Zurich Insurance Group in 2022
Swimming pools, exercise rooms, or other amenities present
No commercial occupancy within the building
risk_highlights.loss_history_summary: 2022 (Zurich Insurance Group): 6 claims, premium $607,294.45, policy cancelled. 2023 (Markel Corporation): 3 claims, premium $619,820.26, no cancellation. 2024 (Travelers Companies): 11 claims, premium $686,236.25, no cancellation. Claims increased significantly in 2024.

extracted_text_sections.operations_description: Boutique hotel ownership and management with integrated restaurant and event operations across Central and South Texas. Operates 4 hotel locations, 3 restaurant locations, and 1 office location. Hours of operation: Mon-Fri 8:00 AM - 5:00 PM. 285 full-time employees and 165 part-time employees.
extracted_text_sections.safety_programs: Formal safety program in place. Written contracts with all subcontractors. Written contracts with indemnification required from all contractors. Buildings fully sprinklered per NFPA 13 or 13R. Fire alarms hard-wired with central station monitoring. Material Safety Data Sheets (MSDS) maintained. Cyber liability protections in place. Quality control/quality assurance program: No.
extracted_text_sections.claims_narrative: 2022: 6 claims with Zurich Insurance Group (policy cancelled). 2023: 3 claims with Markel Corporation (no cancellation). 2024: 11 claims with Travelers Companies (no cancellation). Premiums have increased year-over-year from $607,294.45 to $686,236.25.
